title: The Milky Way
overview: Timid milkman, Burleigh Sullivan, somehow knocks out a boxing champ in a brawl. The fighter's manager decides to build up the milkman's reputation in a series of fixed fights and then have the champ beat him to regain his title.

trailers.title: The Milky Way (1936) -- Burleigh explains his fighting technique.

trailer_groups.title: The Milky Way (1936) -- Burleigh explains his fighting technique.
